docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY SCULL, SUZANNE ( AKA SUDI SCULL) AS TO DEFENDANT FERGUSON, BILL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-05-2008 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE - $59.00) SERVED JAN-05-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FERGUSON, BILL
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-05-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-05-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SCULL, SUZANNE ( AKA SUDI SCULL) IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT FERGUSON, BILL THE EVIDENCE SUBMITTED DID NOT ESTABLISH THAT THE DEFENDANT CAUSED PLAINTIFF'S DAMAGES, NOR THAT THE DAMAGE WAS CAUSED BY PARTIES ACTING AS HIS AGENTS OR EMPLOYEES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-05-2008 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO DEFENDANT FERGUSON, BILL ADDITIONAL PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUN-02-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
